content.description:
"Attachments" is probably better because:

* It's semantically neutral (works for varied relationship types)
* doesn't assume hierarchical parent-child dynamics
* It better describes "this item is connected to these other items"
* It's more intuitive for non-spatial use cases like your meeting/contact example

The trade-off is losing the precise graph theory vocabulary of "parent/child," but that might be worth it for a more flexible, intuitive system that accommodates diverse information management patterns beyond spatial workspaces.
